interfaces.name: getHomePageContent
interfaces.description: Get homepage content including quick access links, featured events, featured campaigns, and orientation text.

interfaces.name: getEventFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Events listing page.

interfaces.name: searchEvents
interfaces.description: Search upcoming events with filters and sorting for the Events listing page.

date_from.description: ISO date, inclusive start of range

date_to.description: ISO date, inclusive end of range

interfaces.name: getEventDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific event, including available ticket types.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: ID of the event to display

chapter.description: Basic chapter info if the event is associated with a chapter; null otherwise

interfaces.name: registerForEvent
interfaces.description: Submit a registration for a specific event and ticket type.

parameters.name: ticketTypeId
parameters.description: Selected ticket type for this registration

interfaces.name: getGiftFormOptions
interfaces.description: Get options and defaults for the Make a Gift page, including funds, tribute types, and payment methods.

interfaces.name: submitGiftPledge
interfaces.description: Submit a one-time gift, recurring gift, or pledge with tribute and offline/online payment options.

interfaces.name: getStayConnectedOverview
interfaces.description: Get overview information for the Stay Connected page, including engagement channels and descriptions.

interfaces.name: getNewsletterSubscriptionFormState
interfaces.description: Get newsletter topics, frequency options, and current subscription (if any) for the Email Newsletter Subscription page.

existing_subscription.description: Null if the user has not subscribed yet

interfaces.name: upsertNewsletterSubscription
interfaces.description: Create or update the user's newsletter subscription with topics, frequency, and consent.

items.description: NewsletterTopic.id values selected by the user

interfaces.name: getChapterFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Chapters & Clubs listing page.

interfaces.name: searchChapters
interfaces.description: Search and sort alumni chapters for the Chapters & Clubs page.

interfaces.name: getChapterDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific alumni chapter, including upcoming events summary and membership info.

interfaces.name: joinChapter
interfaces.description: Submit a chapter membership form for a specific chapter.

interfaces.name: getBenefitFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Alumni Benefits listing page.

interfaces.name: searchBenefits
interfaces.description: Search alumni benefits with filters and sorting for the Alumni Benefits listing page.

interfaces.name: getBenefitDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific benefit, including save-state for the current user.

saved_benefit_id.description: ID of SavedBenefit if saved, otherwise null

saved_note.description: Existing note on SavedBenefit if present

interfaces.name: saveBenefit
interfaces.description: Save a benefit to the user's Saved Benefits list, optionally with a note.

interfaces.name: unsaveBenefit
interfaces.description: Remove a benefit from the user's Saved Benefits list.

parameters.name: benefitId
parameters.description: Benefit to remove from saved list

interfaces.name: getDirectoryFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Alumni Directory Search page.

interfaces.name: searchAlumniProfiles
interfaces.description: Search the public alumni directory with advanced filters and sorting.

name_query.description: Partial match for first or last name

only_visible.description: If true, returns only profiles where is_visible_in_directory is true

interfaces.name: getAlumniProfileDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific alumni profile and whether it is saved in the contact list.

contact_list_entry_id.description: ContactListEntry.id if saved in the default list, otherwise null

interfaces.name: addToContactList
interfaces.description: Add an alumni profile to a contact list, creating the default list if needed.

parameters.name: contactListId
parameters.description: Specific ContactList to use; if omitted, the default list will be used or created

interfaces.name: removeContactListEntry
interfaces.description: Remove an alumni profile from a contact list by contact list entry ID.

interfaces.name: getMentoringProgramsOverview
interfaces.description: Get an overview of mentoring programs for the Volunteer & Mentor Overview page.

interfaces.name: getMentoringProgramDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific mentoring program, including expertise and time commitment options.

interfaces.name: enrollAsMentor
interfaces.description: Submit a mentor enrollment form for a specific mentoring program.

parameters.name: mentoringProgramId
parameters.description: Program to enroll in as a mentor

items.description: MentorExpertiseTopic.id values selected by the user

interfaces.name: getScholarshipFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Scholarships & Support listing page.

interfaces.name: searchScholarships
interfaces.description: Search scholarships with filters and sorting for the Scholarships & Support page.

deadline_after.description: ISO date; only show scholarships with deadline strictly after this date

interfaces.name: getScholarshipDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific scholarship and whether it is saved by the user.

saved_scholarship_id.description: ID of SavedScholarship if saved, otherwise null

saved_note.description: Existing note if the scholarship is saved

interfaces.name: saveScholarship
interfaces.description: Save a scholarship to the user's Saved Scholarships list with an optional note.

interfaces.name: unsaveScholarship
interfaces.description: Remove a scholarship from the user's Saved Scholarships list.

parameters.name: scholarshipId
parameters.description: Scholarship to remove from saved list

interfaces.name: updateSavedScholarshipNote
interfaces.description: Update the note attached to an existing SavedScholarship.

interfaces.name: getSavedItemsOverview
interfaces.description: Get all saved items and contacts for the My Saved Items & Contacts page.

interfaces.name: updateSavedBenefitNote
interfaces.description: Update the note attached to an existing SavedBenefit.

interfaces.name: updateContactListEntry
interfaces.description: Update the note or tags for a ContactListEntry.

interfaces.name: getAlumniOfficeInfo
interfaces.description: Get information for the About the Alumni Office page, including mission, services, contact info, and key policies.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateDefaultContactList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the single user's default ContactList from storage or create it if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateNewsletterSubscription
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve the existing NewsletterSubscription for the single user or create a new one on first save.

helperFunctions.name: _getCurrentTimestamp
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to generate a current timestamp for created_at and saved_at fields.
